hero_subtitle: SFTY connects fragmented ADGM compliance data into structured workflows that preserve audit evidence and simplify regulatory review for digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit readiness falters without connected workflows
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to prepare consistent, audit-ready evidence when ADGM-specific workflows remain disconnected across providers and tools. This fragmentation slows review cycles, weakens traceability and complicates defensible responses to regulator inquiries.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links ADGM-specific provider outputs, regulatory alerts, case reviews and decision logs into one operational workflow for compliance teams to deliver clear, consistent and defensible audit evidence.
workflow_title: From regulatory update to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY maps ADGM regulatory changes to internal rules, routes compliance reviews, and preserves audit evidence for defensible case management and reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented audits. One evidence-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY structures fragmented ADGM compliance outputs into connected cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence without replacing existing providers or workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with jurisdiction-specific workflows that preserve audit-ready evidence, streamline provider orchestration and enable secure enterprise deployment with governed access control.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for ADGM compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides ADGM compliance teams a connected platform to manage jurisdiction-specific rules, Travel Rule workflows, onboarding, case management, and regulatory monitoring within a connected compliance operating layer.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support audit-ready evidence?
faq_2_answer: SFTY preserves evidence packages, decision logs, and workflow history to support audit-ready compliance records aligned with ADGM regulatory expectations and internal policy enforcement.
faq_3_question: How are compliance cases and decisions tracked?
faq_3_answer: Compliance cases, reviewer actions and decision logs are recorded within SFTY, linking provider outputs, regulatory triggers and operational evidence for traceable and defensible audit history.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects multiple KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, orchestrating their outputs into structured workflows without disrupting existing compliance technology stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, turning their outputs into integrated reviews, cases, policy updates and regulatory reports for ADGM compliance.
final_title: Prepare audit-ready evidence for ADGM compliance
final_description: Review how SFTY structures ADGM-specific provider outputs, regulatory rules and cases into clear, defensible compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
